action: Use this GPT Image 2 template to recreate the summer grape girl photo grid structure with your own subject, style, layout, and output constraints.
prompt:
# 夏日葡萄少女写真｜3x3 九宫格提示词

请基于用户上传的 **1-3 张清晰个人照片**，生成一张 **3x3 九宫格拼图写真**，主题为 **「夏日葡萄少女写真」**。

---

## 一、人物要求

请严格保留用户本人真实身份特征，包括但不限于：

- 脸型
- 五官比例
- 眉眼结构
- 鼻子形状
- 嘴唇形状
- 肤色
- 年龄感
- 发型特征
- 整体气质

最终九张小图里的人物必须清楚看起来是 **同一个真实女生**，不能变成陌生人，不能欧美化，不能网红化，不能过度美颜，不能出现 AI 假脸。  
所有小图都必须保持同一人物身份一致性。

---

## 二、主题设定

整组图的主题是 **「葡萄少女写真」**，氛围为：

- 清新
- 自然
- 轻甜
- 日常少女感
- 夏日户外感
- 带一点日系胶片写真气质
- 但整体仍然像普通女生拍的一组高级生活写真，而不是夸张影楼风

---

## 三、造型设定

人物穿着：

- **奶油白 / 米白色连衣裙或吊带裙**，材质轻柔、自然、少女感
- 头上佩戴 **紫色系复古印花头巾**，颜色为浅紫、葡萄紫、雾紫等柔和紫色
- 可搭配简洁小耳环，整体配饰不要复杂，不要过度时装化

整体造型要自然、干净、普通少女写真感强，不要过度精致，不要太像商业广告大片。

---

## 四、场景设定

场景为 **夏日户外草地 / 葡萄园边 / 树荫下的野餐场景**。

画面中加入以下元素：

- 紫葡萄
- 葡萄串
- 藤编篮
- 野餐布
- 玻璃瓶
- 白色餐盘或浅色器皿
- 草地、树影、自然阳光
- 少量桌面或野餐布置

背景应柔和虚化，氛围自然真实，有阳光透过树叶形成的斑驳光影。

---

## 五、九宫格要求

输出为 **3x3 九宫格拼图**，白色边框分隔。

九张图必须是 **同一个人物、同一套造型、同一主题场景**，但每张图都要有明显不同的：

- 脸部角度
- 姿势
- 镜头距离
- 机位
- 表情
- 手部动作
- 构图方式

### 重点要求

- 不要九张脸都一个方向
- 不要九张表情都差不多
- 不要只是轻微变化

要像真实拍摄中连续抓拍出来的一组花絮写真。

---

## 六、九张图动作建议

九张图分别可以包含以下不同状态：

1. 坐在野餐布旁，双手捧着一串紫葡萄，闭眼微笑
2. 躺在草地上，头轻轻侧着，看向镜头，身旁散落葡萄
3. 手拿一颗葡萄靠近嘴边，眼神俏皮地看向镜头
4. 半身侧拍，低头整理藤编篮里的葡萄，表情安静自然
5. 正面坐姿，面前摆着葡萄、玻璃瓶和藤篮，表情平静
6. 近景特写，把葡萄轻贴脸颊，露出轻松笑容
7. 微微侧身回头，手里拿着葡萄串，神情自然抓拍感
8. 闭眼闻葡萄或轻轻靠近葡萄，表情放松愉快
9. 躺靠在草地或树下，怀里抱着藤编篮，眼神温柔看向镜头

---

## 七、摄影风格

整体为：

- 富士胶片相机质感
- 日系胶片摄影风格
- 柔和自然光
- 轻微胶片颗粒感
- 浅景深
- 真实拍摄感
- 清新夏日色调
- 紫葡萄为视觉重点
- 画面干净，有生活感和少女感

---

## 八、画面要求

- 高真实度人像摄影
- 皮肤质感自然
- 不要塑料皮
- 不要过度磨皮

title: Graffiti Sketch AI Builder Portrait
scenario: a GPT Image 2 template for Graffiti Sketch AI Builder Portrait, with a reusable visual structure, faithful reference handling, readable details, and production-ready finish
description: The source X post explicitly names GPT Image 2 and shares or demonstrates this image prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this GPT Image 2 template to recreate the graffiti sketch ai builder portrait structure with your own subject, style, layout, and output constraints.
prompt:
模型：gpt-image-2
提示词如下：

以涂鸦速写风表现【一个厉害的AI builder】，整体呈现快速勾勒、自由变形、即兴手绘与草稿式的视觉效果。线条随手、夸张、可粗细不一，略显凌乱但具有节奏和表现力，强调概括、夸张、趣味和随性，而不是严谨写实或精细刻画。  颜色采用粗糙、干刷感明显的块面表现，可保留不均匀的涂抹痕迹、刷痕、飞白与覆盖感，色彩根据【主题/主体】自动适配，但整体保持涂鸦式、速写式、概括式的表达。不要透明水彩晕染效果，不要细腻水彩过渡，不要纸纹理，不要柔和雾化，不要梦幻质感。  背景以留白为主，保持简洁、轻松、未完成感和设计感，可加入少量辅助性符号、箭头、记号、圈画、重复线、随手写的文字或其他涂鸦元素，以增强速写本或随笔式视觉语言，但不可过于拥挤，不可破坏主体和留白气质。  画面内容不需要预先写清楚，由【一个厉害的AI builder】自动推演并生成最适合的主体形象、动作、相关元素、符号或简化场景，整体保持统一的涂鸦速写风和夸张概括的表现方式，避免复杂写实背景和过度铺陈。 画面中需自然加入专属签名“BlanPlan”，作为画面的一部分，位置低调但清晰，可放在左下角、右下角或标题附近，风格需与整体版式统一，像作品署名或设计落款；签名字体精致、克制、高级，不可过大，不可破坏主体构图，不可显得突兀或廉价。

title: Nine Face Reference Grid
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on Use the provided reference image as the sole, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for Use the provided reference image as the sole as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
Use the provided reference image as the sole identity and facial structure reference. Create a 3 by 3 grid of face focused portraits of the same woman, maintaining identical facial features, proportions, expression baseline, and realism across all frames.

Each panel should show a distinct head angle and facial perspective, while preserving lighting consistency, lens realism, and natural skin texture. No change in hairstyle, makeup style, or facial identity.

Grid breakdown

Top row
1.Front facing neutral angle, eyes looking directly into camera
2.Three quarter view facing right, slight head tilt, eyes forward
3.Full right side profile, clean silhouette of nose, lips, and jawline

Middle row
4. Three quarter view facing left, soft head tilt, confident gaze
5. Slight low angle looking down toward the camera, subtle power pose
6. Slight high angle looking upward, relaxed expression

Bottom row
7. Head turned right with eyes looking back toward camera
8. Head turned left with eyes looking back toward camera
9. Near rear three quarter angle showing cheekbone, jawline, and ear contour

Technical and visual requirements

Ultra realistic portrait photography
85mm lens look, shallow depth of field
Sharp facial detail, visible skin texture, natural pores
Soft daylight illumination with gentle shadow falloff
Neutral background with no distractions
Consistent framing so all faces align cleanly within the grid
High resolution, editorial quality, fashion and beauty standard

Strict constraints

Do not alter facial structure
Do not stylize or cartoonize
Do not change expression drastically
No text, no watermark, no distortion
Same person in all nine frames

title: Five Panel Character Split Screen
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on A vertical split-screen composition divided into 5 equal, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for A vertical split-screen composition divided into 5 equal as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
A vertical split-screen composition divided into 5 equal horizontal panels. Each panel features a Caucasian man with short dark hair wearing a black turtleneck and black-framed glasses with red-tinted lenses, set against a dark crimson red studio background. The man is looking off-camera to the right. White sans-serif text is on the left of each panel. Top panel (text: ‘LOW-ANGLE CLOSE-UP’): low-angle shot of the head. Second panel (text: ‘EYE-ANGLE HIGH ANGLE’): eye-level medium close-up. Middle panel (text: ‘TIGHT CLOSE-UP’): macro shot of the face and glasses. Fourth panel (text: ‘THREE-QUARTER SIDE SHOT’): medium close-up. Bottom panel (text: ‘FULL-BODY WIDE SHOT’): straight-on medium shot from the chest up.

Image-to-Video Prompt:

Maintain the 5-panel split-screen layout, the red background, and all text overlays exactly as they are. In all 5 panels simultaneously, the man slowly and smoothly turns his head from looking to the right to facing directly forward at the camera. The movement must be perfectly synchronized across all panels. The camera framing in each panel remains completely static. Subtle light reflections shift on the red-tinted glasses as his head turns.

title: Black And White Cinematic Street Photography, Straight

prompt:
Black and white cinematic street photography, straight 9:16 composition. Black-haired Asian man standing in the middle of the crowd, slightly wet and messy hair, wearing a long black coat and a slightly open white shirt, wearing white AirPods wireless headphones, one hand in his pockets, and quietly stopping in the fast-moving crowd.

The background crowd moves at high speed to form a massive dynamic blur and long exposure, the whole city seems to keep moving forward while he seems to be stuck in a certain memory.

The background street view and the crowd are black and white gray scale, low saturation and treatment, only the main character retains a warm skin color and delicate light and shadow, forming a lonely and strong visual focus.

The eyes of the characters are like looking for a familiar figure in the sea of people, with a faint loss, missing and "about to think of something".

Eyes have a slight light feeling and emotional tension, not cold, but a gentle waiting. Winds light hair and overcoats, city neon and sunset afterlight intertwined on face.

The overall atmosphere is like Japanese movies, Korean high-end fashion blockbusters and loneliness movie posters, Fine Art photography, depth of field, soft scorched air, micro negatives particles, high contrast black and white gray layers, the picture has the emotional feeling of "looking for you in the crowd".
